metadata.description: Supplier invoice reconciliation and cost-per-bowl tracking for Liang Zai Kitchen. Skills drive the workflow; all database/Loyverse/Gmail-send work runs through the liangzai gateway MCP.

plugins.name: liangzai
plugins.description: Liang Zai agents — capture supplier invoices and Loyverse sales, reconcile each month's Statements of Account line-by-line, and track supplier cost per bowl. Persists everything through the liangzai gateway MCP; it never approves and never pays.
